hero_title: Plan your entire trip in one place
hero_subtitle: Search trains, buses, and hotels together. Compare prices. Save your itinerary.
feature_unified_desc: Trains, buses, and hotels in a single search. No more switching between 4 different apps.
feature_compare_desc: Side-by-side pricing across all transport modes. Find the cheapest route instantly.
feature_save_desc: Save your complete trip plan and share it with family via a simple link.
feature_hindi_desc: Full Hindi language interface, built for Tier-2/3 city travelers.
login_subtitle: Sign in to access your saved trips
register_subtitle: Join TripSathi and start planning smarter
footer_tagline: Making travel planning simple for every Indian.
